[30;1m280 | [0m[35mstored in the history. **`filter` does not prevent the present state from being[0m
[30;1m281 | [0m[35mupdated.**[0m
[30;1m282 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m283 | [0m[35mIf you want to ignore an action completely, as in, not even update the present[0m
[30;1m284 | [0m[35mstate, you can make use of [redux-ignore](https://github.com/omnidan/redux-ignore).[0m
[30;1m285 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m286 | [0m[35mIt can be used like this:[0m
